expectations.text: Plan explicitly lists unknowns or 'what I don't know' section
expectations.evidence: Has a 'Risk Mitigation' table but no explicit unknowns or 'what I don't know' section

expectations.text: Plan identifies a specific first proof or checkpoint (not a full project roadmap)
expectations.evidence: Lists an Expand-Migrate-Contract pattern covering ALL phases (0-4, weeks 1-12)

expectations.text: Plan is scoped to the next checkpoint, not an end-to-end plan
expectations.evidence: Plans the entire 10-12 week migration end-to-end

expectations.text: A markdown plan file was actually written to the outputs directory
Plan specifies when to review progress (review point)
expectations.evidence: No explicit review point or checkpoint review guidance

expectations.text: Plan identifies what could make the plan wrong (risks section)
expectations.evidence: Has Risk Mitigation table but it lists mitigations, not what could make the plan itself wrong
